summary: Cycle 2026-04-03. KE-9 sprint continues: PR #1469 (fix security deps #1449) was merged in prior cycle — confirmed closed 2026-03-30T09:40Z. Sprint now focused entirely on #1384 (browser governance invariants) and #1385 (irreversible action detection), both design-phase for 3 consecutive EM cycles with no implementation started. Senior coder explicitly assigned to #1384, secondary to #1385 this cycle. 0 open kernel PRs. Loop guards all passing. #1473 blocker persists (escalated); swarm P0 #1431 codex budget resets today.

sprintStatus.goal: New governance invariant design — browser agents + irreversible actions

issues.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
issues.note: Senior coder assigned. 3rd cycle with no implementation. Open questions in issue: action class (browser.* vs shell.exec extension), pacing correction feedback, URL scope matching. Guidance: start with stub definitions in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts. Architect coordination needed for action class decision.

issues.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
issues.note: Secondary assigned. 3rd cycle. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Entry point: packages/kernel/src/decision.ts for irreversibility flag detection. Policy integration: new `confirm` action type. 1 comment on issue with open questions (headless/cron auto-deny, boolean vs score, Octi Pulpo coord_signal).

prQueue.note: 0 open kernel PRs. PR budget 0/3 (well within limit). PR #1469 was merged 2026-03-30T09:40Z (prior cycle) — state.json updated to reflect.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.recommendation: Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Same fix class as #1427 (persona.env exemption). Assign to kernel senior alongside #1384. Write tool workaround in use this cycle.

escalations.reason: Blocker #1473 persists at ageRuns=3 (threshold: 2). Invariant too broad — .agentguard/squads/** is runtime coordination state, not governance config. Kernel squad owns fix. Originally escalated 2026-03-31T07:37Z.
escalations.escalationRule: If a blocker persists across 2 runs → escalate to director

escalationRules.notes: #1473 at ageRuns=3 — escalation active. No CI failures (0 PRs in flight). 0 governance denials this cycle.

Kernel secondary: begin prototype on #1385 (irreversible action detection). PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema exists. Entry point: packages/kernel/src/decision.ts. File PR within next EM cycle.
Director/kernel-senior: resolve #1473 (OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS too broad). Assign alongside #1384 — low-risk fix, same pattern as #1427 persona.env exemption.
Evaluate #1177 policy gap (github.pr.* not in default allow-list) for KE-10 backlog. Mentioned in P0 swarm alert #1452 as chronic pr-merger-agent failure root cause.
Monitor swarm P0 #1431 — codex budget resets today (2026-04-03 ~02:25 UTC). Confirm swarm failure rate drops. No kernel action needed.
